span.p:
token-per-watt-per-user
~2-2.5x vs TUNED baseline
(only 5-15x vs naive)

div.style: color: rgb(110, 31, 27) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
always-on density
HBM-bound ~10-40 / GPU
before mitigation

div.style: color: rgb(110, 31, 27) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
token-per-watt UNMEASURABLE today
no watt data — instrument
nvml / RAPL first

span.p:
tool-call OVERHEAD
~50-300ms to tens of us
~1000x [med-high]

DOS ADJUDICATION
232-262ms Py / 5.4-13.9ms Go
to 38ns-160us in-proc [measured]

div.style: color: rgb(28, 82, 48) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
cost center is CONTEXT
~150,168 in : ~2,817 out
~53:1, ~98% re-sent

div.style: color: rgb(70, 88, 106) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
~1000x on overhead is REAL;
'100x always-on' is HBM-GATED

div.style: color: rgb(70, 88, 106) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
BUILD ORDER
1 — instrument watts first
2 — resident-KV + tool-wait batching
3 — vDSO + pre-flight
4 — headroom as the admit gate
5 — speculation last
